accent_mono.usage: Overlines, statistics, metrics, labels, code snippets, dates

visual_enhancers.noise: Subtle grain texture overlay on the body (opacity-20) to kill digital flatness
visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: Use framer-motion to create a 1px electric teal line tracing project cards on hover
visual_enhancers.grid_background: Faint 1px grid lines (border-white/5) or dot-matrix backgrounds to enforce the 'quant/data' motif
visual_enhancers.glow: Radial gradients using the accent color for subtle background illumination behind key metrics

components_strategy.header: Crystal Glass header (bg-black/60, backdrop-blur-xl) with a delicate 1px border-white/10 on the bottom. Do NOT make it fully transparent.
components_strategy.hero: Custom pure HTML/Tailwind + Framer Motion. Large kinetic text with masked line-by-line reveal (Dhairya Shah). US Location badge as a technical pill component.
components_strategy.about: Numbered manifesto layout. Use JetBrains Mono for chapter numbers (01. The Origin, 02. The Pivot). Left-aligned, editorial typography.
components_strategy.experience: Vertical timeline structure. Use a sticky 1px vertical line that 'fills up' with electric teal on scroll using Framer Motion.
components_strategy.projects: Bento grid (Mode B: High Density). Use solid flat surfaces with sharp 1px borders. Add subtle scaling on hover.
components_strategy.skills: Dense bento grid. Skills grouped as monospaced technical tags.
components_strategy.contact: Shadcn UI Form heavily customized to fit the dark aesthetic. Inputs should have #050505 background and 1px borders, lighting up with an electric teal focus ring.

motion.scroll: Lenis smooth scroll (MANDATORY). Wrapping the layout to provide momentum scrolling.
motion.reveals: Framer motion for scroll-triggered staggered y-axis reveals. Every element should feel 'placed' intentionally.
motion.marquee: react-fast-marquee for a slow, editorial ribbon of text (e.g., 'DATA • FINANCE • QUANT • BUSINESS'). Massive outline text.
motion.micro: Hover states on all buttons and cards with smooth transform and border color transitions.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets WCAG AA (4.5:1). Electric teal used against #050505 passes. Use text shadows over images.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query for Framer Motion.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-contact-button').

hero_background.description: Abstract blue waves of glowing particles for subtle background or visual accent

portrait.description: Moody, dark profile of a professional male in a blazer (placeholder for Dhairya)

project_finance.description: Neon candlestick chart for Economic Forecasting project

project_luxury.description: Abstract dark blue wavy texture for Global Luxury Resale project

media.logos: Use simple text spans or lucide-react icons for company logos (Accenture, Stevens, etc.) to maintain the minimalist developer aesthetic.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install the required libraries mentioned in the JSON.
All React code should be written in .js/.jsx files (not .tsx) as the system uses .js files.
Implement Lenis smooth scrolling in a top-level App or Layout component wrapper.
Create the Kinetic Hero: Use framer-motion to animate the 'Dhairya Shah' text from y: 100% and opacity 0 within an overflow-hidden wrapper, simulating a mask reveal.
Style the About section as a 'Numbered Manifesto'. Use JetBrains Mono for the numbers and align text in an editorial fashion.
Build the Experience section as a vertical timeline. Connect nodes with a 1px vertical border.
Implement the Contact section with Resend integration or a well-stubbed handler for the customized Shadcn form.
Use data-testid on every CTA, link, form input, and submit button.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Prioritize asymmetric or structured bento grids.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) combined with subtle 1px inner borders.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons. Use lucide-react instead.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable (e.g., p-12, gap-8). Cramped designs look cheap.
Ensure the header navigation is NEVER fully transparent. It must have a solid or blurred background.
Always use modern pill-shaped or sharp technical buttons.
